# G. Availability

- Initial: Reserved; Cable plugin: -; Cable unplug: -
- Initial: Unavailable; Cable plugin: -; Cable unplug: -
- Initial: Faulted; Cable plugin: -; Cable unplug: -

# G. Availability

G02.FR.07 (Precondition: When the heartbeat interval timer is continuously reset because of continuous sending of messages AND HeartbeatRequest is used for time synchronisation): It is RECOMMENDED that the Charging Station sends a HeartbeatRequest at least once every 24 hours to synchronise the clock.

198/491 Part 2 - Specification
